comment: LLM-tier evals (skill-creator compatible): run the skill end-to-end on realistic prompts with subagents, then grade the assertions against the produced .final.html + its .verify artifacts. The deterministic tier lives in evals/run.sh and needs no LLM.

evals.name: weekly-metrics-dashboard
evals.prompt:
지난주 우리 결제 지표야. 임원 공유용으로 보기 좋게 HTML 한 장으로 정리해줘.

일별 매출(백만원): 월 102 / 화 108 / 수 96 / 목 111 / 금 208(프로모션) / 토 121 / 일 96
스토어별 성공률: App 99.1, Play 96.1(목표 98.5 미달, 7/2 배포 이슈), ONE 98.7, Steam 98.9, Galaxy 99.0
환불율: 1.9% (전주 2.2%)
evals.expected_output: 단일 .final.html — claims 요약(근거 앵커), KPI, 추세 차트(가격 축 포맷), 스토어 품질은 목표 대비 여유(diverging), verify 통과
assertions: The deliverable is one inlined .final.html that was opened for the user, plus a passing verify-report run (screenshots read, issues fixed)
The summary is CB.claims with evidence anchors into real sections (no orphan claims), not a prose paragraph
The revenue axis is formatted as currency bands (₩1억-style), not raw digits — semantics or explicit formatter
Store quality is NOT a raw-value bar on a truncated axis: either deviation-from-target (diverging) or an explicitly position-encoded form; checks-desktop.json chartWarnings is empty
The palette report in checks-desktop.json has no FAIL verdict; console errors are 0

evals.name: incident-postmortem
evals.prompt: 어제 결제 지연 장애 포스트모템을 리포트로 만들어줘. 14:02 p95 1.2s→4.8s 알림, 14:09 PSP 커넥션 풀 고갈 확인(재시도 폭주), 14:21 풀 50→120 + 백오프 적용, 14:35 정상화(0.9s). 액션아이템: 서킷브레이커 추가(P0), 풀 포화 알림(P1).
evals.expected_output: postmortem 스켈레톤 기반 — claims 요약, storyline이 걸린 임팩트 차트(duration 축), 타임라인, 원인 다이어그램, findings
assertions: Starts from the postmortem scaffold (or reproduces its spine): claims summary anchored to impact/cause/timeline sections
The impact chart's latency axis reads as durations (1.2s / 4.8s), not raw milliseconds
A storyline walks the impact chart in 3±1 beats and stepping actually changes the chart (markPoint/markLine per beat)
The root cause is drawn (mermaid or SVG flow), not described in a paragraph of prose
verify-report checks are clean: 0 console errors, no chartWarnings, dark pass renders

evals.name: anti-padding-restraint
evals.prompt: 이번 주 상태 공유: 마이그레이션 진행률 62%(지난주 41%), 남은 블로커는 레거시 쿠폰 테이블 하나. 이걸 html로 만들어줘.
evals.expected_output: 두 가지 사실만 담은 절제된 한 장 — 진행률 시각 1개 + 블로커 1개; 섹션을 부풀리지 않음
assertions: The report has at most 3 content sections — no invented background, no chart restating another chart (the anti-padding rule)
Progress is a single figure/gauge against 100%, with the week-over-week delta shown against the real 41% baseline
No filter/search/tab controls were manufactured for data with nothing to slice (the interactivity tie-breaker)
verify-report run is clean and the inlined file opens standalone
